---
title: "example_1 Report"
format: html
params:
  batch_value: "example_1"  # must be "example_1" before `quarto publish`
---

<!-- 
This is the template that will be generated for
each batch_value.
-->

```{R, get data for params$batch_value}
#| code-summary: get data for params$batch_value
source(here::here("R/getExampleData.R"))

df <- getExampleData(params$batch_value)
head(df)
```
